hypothesis: EEG P3b parietal Granger-causes CLM layer 25-30; unidirectional (EEG→CLM ≥ 2× CLM→EEG)

dry_run.note: AR(1) RSS-ratio F-stat proxy. Real Granger causality (statsmodels grangercausalitytests with VAR pre-whitening) replaces in D+5.

post_arrival_workflow.input: anima-eeg P3b ERP epochs (parietal, 250-450ms post-stim) + CLM hidden-state trace layers 25-30
post_arrival_workflow.clm_substrate: edu/cell/lagrangian/l_ix_integrator.hexa V_sync hidden trace at layer-equivalent depth
post_arrival_workflow.replace: this AR(1) proxy with VAR(p)+grangercausalitytests; pick p via BIC; bootstrap CI 1000 reps
